report.summary: v9 community cycle: Added DeFi education series content (4 new tweets + Discord/TG Tuesday update) featuring Flash Loans Guide + DeFi Vaults Guide built this cycle, created DeFi Education social card (1200x630 SVG with 3 feature cards + platform stats), updated content calendar v6 with Tue-Wed slots, newsletter v5 addendum ready (deploy-dependent), all links deployment-safe.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet: DeFi Education Series Teaser — 86 ecosystem deep dives, flash loans + vaults + liquidation mechanics, links to /ecosystem (LIVE) — schedule Tue PM
Tweet: Flash Loans Hook — $30B Aave volume, zero collateral, single-block repay, teaser for upcoming guide — HELD for post-deploy
Tweet: Vault Strategies for Fear Markets — 4 vault types (lending, options, LP, yield tokenization), deploy-safe links to /ecosystem — schedule Wed
Tweet: Midweek Data Update — whale 270K BTC, F&G extreme fear day 47+, CLARITY Act holding, exchange supply 6-year low, links to /tools/whale-tracker (LIVE) — schedule Wed PM
Discord/TG: Tuesday Update — Flash Loans + DeFi Vaults content pipeline preview, market snapshot, CLARITY Act status, 4 live tool links
Newsletter v5 addendum: Flash Loans Guide + DeFi Vaults Guide entries for NEW ON DEGEN0X section (deploy-dependent)
CARRIED FROM v8: All 8 previous posts (whale accumulation, DCA fear, Monday macro, CLARITY Act tweet + 4-part thread, engagement poll, Discord Monday update, newsletter v4)
